notes: SHIP v1.14.226 — PERSISTENT BUILD BADGE (Forge handoff §10, applies app-wide). A subtle top-right badge shows the running build so device-verify of successive ships is unambiguous — directly kills the 'am I on the latest?' confusion that cost us on the deploy bug. SOURCE = the canonical PHANTOM_APP_VERSION const (NOT a version.json fetch): deliberate, because a stale service worker serves stale HTML → stale const → the badge honestly shows the OLD version, whereas a fresh version.json behind stale HTML would LIE. No new version authority — it's a display of the same const that's already stamped in three-lockstep. IMPL: (1) markup <div id="ver-stamp"> as a top-level element after #forge3d-sheet; (2) CSS base display:none + body.rd fixed badge (top: safe-top + 3rem, right 8px, z-index 45, subtle slate on translucent, pointer-events:none so it NEVER blocks a tap); (3) a DOMContentLoaded listener right after the const sets its text to 'v' + PHANTOM_APP_VERSION.replace('phantom-',''). LEGACY: base #ver-stamp{display:none}; only body.rd reveals it → ?legacy=1 byte-identical (legacy already surfaces the version on the boot .boot-eyebrow). Additive: 1 markup node + 2 CSS lines + 1 listener. Gates: node --check sw.js + 4 inline blocks · CSS brace balance · CRLF · three-stamp lockstep .225->.226 · badge markup/CSS/JS present · body.rd-gated. ROLLBACK: git revert clean. DEVICE-VERIFY (batch, HARD STOP): update to v1.14.226, then: (1) a small 'v1.14.226' badge shows top-right in the New UI (tune position if it collides — pointer-events:none means it never eats taps); (2) it reads the ACTUAL loaded build (if a stale SW is serving old code, it shows the OLD number — that's the point); (3) ?legacy=1 -> no badge. This badge makes the rest of the batch verify self-checking. STILL OWED (batch, at the 6-ship cap — verify before more ships): .220 3D parity, .221 SYS->ERRORS, .222 Forge Stage 1 (SYS->FORGE 3D), .224 ops-content dead-tap sweep, .225 Command Lens tap-throughs. (.223 deploy card DEVICE-VERIFIED.) NEXT (after batch verify): Forge Stage 2 (hero) — gated on Stage-1 verify + the still-missing MOCKUP-HYBRID-v13.html; then the consolidated .218-.226 tracker roll into CLAUDE.md + memory.
